cells.rationale: Hard-to-pin producer trace plus the load-bearing classification verdict and design-decision ADR that gates the whole epic is intelligence-bound investigation and design.
Contract-touching router divert (new union variant, exhaustiveness, re-fold-deterministic notify fold) with a subtle page-once correctness invariant and an over-broad-divert reclassification risk.

New autonomous resolver chain with subtle concurrency and correctness invariants — TTL/lease reclaim, human-retry-vs-resolver race, session-dedup collision, green-gating — where a wrong abstraction propagates.
Multi-file forward-facing docs reconciliation following the ADR — needs consolidation judgment to stay lint-green but is well-specified, not intelligence-bound.
